Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.527

Title: Authorizes the town of Greenburgh to alienate and discontinue the use of certain parkland
Summary: Authorizes the town of Greenburgh to alienate and discontinue the use of certain parkland and to lease such land to HESP Solar LLC for a term not to exceed twenty-five years.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the town of Greenburgh, county of Westchester, to alienate and discontinue the use of certain parkland
